economic_notes: Nation has multiple business enterprises including Coast Salish Development Corporation, Deer Point Developments LP, Ivy Green Petroleum LP, Thuthiqut Resources LP, Thuy'she'num Investments LP, and Thuy'she'num Property Management LP. Thuy'she'num Property Management LP earned net income of $8,820,051 for year ended December 31, 2022.
notes: Audit is qualified due to non-compliance with PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations - Nation has not identified ARO liabilities. Consolidated entities include Stu'ate Lelum Secondary School, Chemainus Native College, CMHC Social Housing Program, 1089106 B.C. Ltd., and Stz'uminus Education Society. Six business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method. Stz'uminus Education Society (Schedule 12) expenses of $10,074,513 included, which combines with Schedule 4 Education expenses of $455,369 for total education-related expenses. Investments in First Nation business entities valued at $35,834,778 using modified equity method. Large increase in earnings from business entities ($10,968,530 vs $3,610,708 prior year) primarily driven by Thuy'she'num Property Management LP net income of $8,820,051. Distribution to members of $531,339 deducted from surplus. Due to related Nation entities of $4,178,635 on balance sheet.
